Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Calvin Matsuo, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona. No appearance by Plaintiff.

RULING:
The Judgment Debtor's Claim of exemption is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
